commit_message: Update stats.test (attributes changed from factor to chr ...)

Use dev version of SticsRFiles for tests

Packages are developed synchronously so tests in the dev version of croplotr should use the dev version of SticsRFiles. 
SticsRFiles is now suggested at release version for users (from previous commit).
Update stats.test (attributes changed from factor to chr ...)
Modif to allow non-observed situations in sit_list
fix: rendering files and dirs paths under windows

Added tests:

- test that forcing parameters per situation works
- advanced test for parameter estimation on rotations
